feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: Llama 3.2: Revolutionizing edge AI and vision with open, customizable models

link.title: Llama 3.2: Revolutionizing edge AI and vision with open, customizable models

entry.summary: Today, we’re releasing Llama 3.2, which includes small and medium-sized vision LLMs, and lightweight, text-only models that fit onto edge and mobile devices.

entry.title: Introducing Llama 3.1: Our most capable models to date

link.title: Introducing Llama 3.1: Our most capable models to date

entry.summary: Bringing open intelligence to all, our latest models expand context length, add support across eight languages, and include Meta Llama 3.1 405B— the...

entry.title: Google Gemini updates: Flash 1.5, Gemma 2 and Project Astra

link.title: Google Gemini updates: Flash 1.5, Gemma 2 and Project Astra

entry.summary: We’re sharing updates across our Gemini family of models and a glimpse of Project Astra, our vision for the future of AI assistants.
